# `polars selector signed-integer` for [expression](/commands/categories/expression.md)

<div class='command-title'>Select all signed integer columns.</div>

## Signature

```> polars selector signed-integer {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input | output          |
| ----- | --------------- |
| any   | polars_selector |
## Examples

Select all signed integer columns
```nu
> {
        "foo": ["x", "y"],
        "bar": [123, 456],
        "baz": [2.0, 5.5],
        "zap": [-1, -2],
    } |
    polars into-df --as-columns |
    polars select (polars selector signed-integer) |
    polars sort-by bar zap |
    polars collect
╭───┬─────┬─────╮
│ # │ bar │ zap │
├───┼─────┼─────┤
│ 0 │ 123 │  -1 │
│ 1 │ 456 │  -2 │
╰───┴─────┴─────╯

```
